title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Hindustan Unilever

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Hindustan Unilever
jsonLd.description:
We at Hindustan Unilever are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Jabalpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Hindustan Unilever:
Hindustan Unilever is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Unilever!
